series_metadata.series_title: GAF-84 Revenue Receipts and Holding Acco
series_metadata.series_description: Revenue Receipts and Holding Account Redistribu- tion. Used to deposit and record revenue receipts from any known revenue source.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 4 years, then destroy provided audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released. ; Electronic: Retain 4 years, then destroy provided audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released., Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Erase
